root.sql:
select tab.* , (select max(count_mem) from tab where account_id = '6' and confirm_date = '!at_date!') as mem_no_loan from ( select * from ( select '3' as account_id , '' as account_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , 0 as count_mem , sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as sum_balance , ' รวมหนี้คงเหลือ' as text from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = '115120' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ('21','25') and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '!at_date!' group by sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date )
union
select * from ( select '2' as account_id , 'ลูกหนี้เงินกู้สามัญ (คนค้ำประกัน)' as account_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , count(sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no) as count_mem , sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as sum_balance , 'คน มูลค่าหุ้น' as text from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cls_confirm_data where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no in (select membership_no from sc_cls_confirm_data tab , sc_lon_m_rule lon where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and lon.loan_type = tab.data_type and data_group = 'LON' and data_balance > '0' and lon.account_id = '115120' and lon.loan_type not in ('21','25') and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date ) and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '!at_date!' group by sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date )
union
select * from ( select '5' as account_id , '' as account_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , 0 as count_mem , sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as sum_balance , ' รวมหนี้คงเหลือ' as text from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = '115120' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type in ('21','25') and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '!at_date!' group by sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date )
union
select * from ( select '4' as account_id , 'ลูกหนี้เงินกู้สามัญ (หุ้นค้ำประกัน)' as account_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , count(sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no) as count_mem , sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as sum_balance , 'คน มูลค่าหุ้น' as text from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cls_confirm_data where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no in (select membership_no from sc_cls_confirm_data tab , sc_lon_m_rule lon where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and lon.loan_type = tab.data_type and data_group = 'LON' and data_balance > '0' and lon.account_id = '115120' and lon.loan_type in ('21','25') and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date ) and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '!at_date!' group by sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date )
union
select * from ( select '1' as account_id , 'จำนวนสมาชิกทั้งหมด' as account_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , count(sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no) as count_mem , sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as sum_balance , 'คน มูลค่าหุ้นทั้งหมด' as text from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cls_confirm_data where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '!at_date!' group by sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date )
union
select * from ( select '6' as account_id , 'สมาชิกที่ไม่ได้กู้' as account_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , count(sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no) as count_mem , sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as sum_balance , 'คน มูลค่าหุ้น' as text from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cls_confirm_data where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no not in (select membership_no from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no and data_group = 'LON' and data_balance > '0' and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date ) and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '!at_date!' group by sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date )
union
select * from ( select '7' as account_id , 'รวมจำนวนทั้งสิ้น' account_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , count(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno) as count_mem , sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as sum_balance , 'คน รวมหนี้ทั้งหมด' as text from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = '01' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = '115120' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '!at_date!' group by sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date ) ) tab --รายงานมี Formatting Rules
